site.title: EasyTech Wiki — World Conqueror, European War & more
site.description: The reference wiki for EasyTech strategy games: World Conqueror 4, European War 6/7, Great Conqueror Rome. Detailed elite unit stats, generals, technologies and guides.

wc4Hub.tagline: The most complete English-language guide to mastering EasyTech's World Conqueror 4. Detailed stats, elite units level by level, optimal generals and conquest strategies.
wc4Hub.underConstructionNote: stats are extracted directly from the game files (WC4 v1.24.2). Editorial content (descriptions, bonuses, strategy) is being progressively enriched.

elitesPage.intro: from the standard roster are unique units with exclusive perks, scaling from level 1 to level 12. Each entry details per-level stats, active and passive skills, and the best generals to pair them with.
elitesPage.seeScorpion: 🦂 See also the Scorpion Empire units
elitesPage.statsWarning: ⚠️ Extrapolated stats — in-game verification in progress

skillsPage.intro: extracted directly from the game, organised exactly like the Academy. The 5 learnable series (Field Tactics, Command, Logistics, Defense, Offense) group all skills you can unlock with medals. The section
skillsPage.introEnd: covers every signature or training skill tied to a particular hero (Rokossovsky — Hero, Eisenhower — Super Commander, etc.).
skillsPage.introFootnote: Each entry details the full description, the L1→L5 progression, the per-level medal cost and the list of generals who carry it. Descriptions are in English (source: official game files).

skillDetailPage.descFootnoteFr: French translation under review — the official English wording takes precedence. The « X » placeholder is replaced by the real value at each level (table below).
skillDetailPage.descFootnoteEn: Source: official game files. The « X » placeholder is replaced by the real value at each level (table below).
skillDetailPage.cumulativeCostNote: . At the Academy, you can learn this skill to slot it into any free slot of a compatible general.
skillDetailPage.signatureExplainer: 👑 This skill cannot be learned at the Academy: it is carried directly by the generals listed below (base kit or via Swords/Sceptres training).
skillDetailPage.notIndexedSuffix: entries reference generals not yet catalogued in the wiki (premium training, unindexed variants).
skillDetailPage.notIndexedOnly: This skill is carried by {count} general(s) not yet indexed in the wiki. Entries coming soon.

general.academyHint: 🎓 Slots marked « free » can be replaced at the Academy for medals. You can vote for your preferred pick — community results appear below each slot.
general.trainingHint: 💡 Swords and Sceptres of Dominance are a premium resource: ~4 swords + 2 sceptres free per month from the shop. Only bronze, silver and gold generals can be trained — Marshals (IAP) have no training path.
general.acquisitionCampaignNote: ⚠ This general is unlocked through the campaign (not obtainable in Free Conquest).
general.acquisitionMedalsNote: 🎖 Medals are earned by completing campaign missions and winning Conquests.
general.acquisitionIronCrossNote: 💰 This Marshal general can only be obtained with Iron Crosses (IAP).
general.alsoMentioned: Units also mentioned but not yet in the wiki:

scorpionPage.seoTitle: Scorpion Empire (Black Scorpion / Mystic Forces) — WC4
scorpionPage.seoDescription: Complete guide to the Scorpion Empire in World Conqueror 4: mystic units (Titan Tank, KS-90, Heavenly Beginning Tank, SVA-23), captains Osborn, Williams and Colson, lore and strategies.
scorpionPage.subtitle: Black Scorpion Empire — Mystic Forces — New World Order
scorpionPage.heroParagraph: The Scorpion Empire (also called Black Scorpion Empire or Mystic Forces) is the fictional antagonist faction of World Conqueror 4, emerging as the new world order at the end of the Modern War scenario. Led by Osborn and his two captains Williams and Colson, this empire fields ultra-powerful mystic units with evocative names: Titan Tank, Heavenly Beginning Tank, KS-90, SVA-23, Mystic Bomber…
scorpionPage.loreP1: In the World Conqueror 4 campaign, the Scorpion Empire appears as the final enemy after the resolution of modern global conflicts. Its technological base is founded on mystic systems and futuristic weaponry that outclass real-world equivalents.
scorpionPage.loreP2: Osborn's origin traces back to a British general named Alfred, a non-recruitable character who appears in the Dunkirk mission of the Origin of the Scorpion Empire event. This narrative continuity makes Osborn the secret through-line of the game — first an ally, then the leader of the Empire.
scorpionPage.loreWarning: ⚠️ These units are campaign-exclusive. They cannot be obtained in classic Conquest and have no real-world equivalent — the stats displayed are extrapolations pending in-game verification.
scorpionPage.captainsHeading: 👨‍✈️ The three captains of the Empire
scorpionPage.unitsHeading: 🛡 Mystic units of the Scorpion Empire

votesLegalPage.seoDescription: How community voting works for generals' trainable skills: anonymity, safeguards, vote duration.
votesLegalPage.sectionPurposeBody: On trainable general pages, we display a small community poll allowing players to indicate which skill they prefer on each reconfigurable slot. The goal is to provide a snapshot of the current meta, alongside our editorial recommendation.
votesLegalPage.sectionDataItemCookie: A technical cookie set when voting (wc4_vote_<general>_<slot>), kept for 30 days, which prevents voting twice on the same slot.
votesLegalPage.sectionDataItemTurnstile: A temporary Cloudflare Turnstile token, verified server-side and then discarded immediately — no persistent data linked to your identity is stored by Cloudflare.
votesLegalPage.sectionDataItemCounter: An aggregate counter per skill, with no link to your browser or IP.
votesLegalPage.sectionDataFooter: We store no IP, no browser fingerprint, no user account. There is also no advertising cookie or third-party tracker linked to this feature.
votesLegalPage.sectionCookieHeading: Why a cookie without a consent banner?
votesLegalPage.sectionCookieBody: The wc4_vote_* cookie is a strictly necessary functional cookie for the proper operation of the voting service (it prevents double votes). As such, it is exempt from prior consent under applicable EU privacy law (GDPR Recital 32 and ePrivacy Directive Article 5(3)).
votesLegalPage.sectionDurationBody: A vote is valid for 30 rolling days. After that, you may vote again (the meta evolves with patches and game modes).
votesLegalPage.sectionSafeguardsItemWhitelist: Server whitelist: only skill IDs officially offered for a given slot are accepted.
votesLegalPage.sectionSafeguardsItemModeration: Editorial moderation: in case of abnormal mass voting (coordinated campaign, raid), we reserve the right to invalidate affected votes.
votesLegalPage.sectionRightsBody: Since no personal data is linked to your vote, there is nothing to individually delete. You can clear the wc4_vote_* cookie from your browser settings to "unlock" yourself before the 30 days are up.
votesLegalPage.sectionContactBody: For any questions related to this feature, please use the site's contact form.

techPage.hubIntro: All research technologies in the game: infantry, armor, artillery, navy, airforce, fortifications, anti-air and missiles. Full stats by level.
